data.title: Sun Summit Secures $2.67M in Private Placement
data.description:
Sun Summit Minerals Corp. (TSE:SMN) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Sun Summit Minerals Corp. announced the closure of its non-brokered private placement, raising over $2.67 million through the sale of flow-through and non-flow-through units. The company corrected previous errors in reported figures and detailed the issuance of finder warrants, with the transaction awaiting final TSX Venture Exchange approval.

data.title: Carnival Corporation Reports Record 2024 Earnings
data.description:
Carnival Corporation & plc ( (CUK) ) has released its Q4 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Carnival Corporation & plc presented to its investors.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Carnival Corporation & plc, the largest global cruise company, operates a portfolio of world-class cruise lines including Carnival Cruise Line, Princess Cruises, and Holland America Line, offering leisure travel experiences worldwide.

The company reported impressive financial results for 2024, surpassing its own guidance and setting records in several key areas. Carnival’s full-year revenues reached an all-time high of $25 billion, a more than 15% increase from the previous year, driven by strong demand across its cruise lines.

Key highlights from 2024 include a net income of $1.9 billion, adjusted EBITDA of $6.1 billion, and operating income of $3.6 billion, all of which show significant growth over the previous year. The company’s booking volumes for 2025 are at an all-time high, both in terms of price and occupancy, indicating continued strong demand. Carnival also made substantial progress in reducing its debt, paying off $8 billion since January 2023, and achieved a net debt to adjusted EBITDA ratio of 4.3x.

Looking ahead, Carnival expects continued growth in 2025, with adjusted net income projected to increase by over 20% to approximately $2.3 billion and adjusted EBITDA to rise to $6.6 billion. The company remains focused on its sustainability goals, having reduced greenhouse gas emissions and food waste significantly in 2024.

Carnival Corporation & plc is poised for another strong year in 2025, with management optimistic about further yield growth and operational improvements. The company is actively working on strategies to enhance guest experiences and increase global awareness of cruise travel, setting the stage for continued success in the cruise industry.

data.description:
Finlay Minerals (TSE:FYL) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Finlay Minerals recently announced the expiration of over 13 million common share purchase warrants held by John Andrew Barakso, impacting the overall ownership structure. Despite this expiration, Barakso maintains significant influence over the company, holding approximately 43.25% of the total issued and outstanding common shares.

iMetal Resources has successfully closed the first tranche of its private placement, raising $670,002.90 by issuing over 4.4 million units, each comprising a common share and a warrant. Grounded People Apparel Inc. is set to expand its sustainable fashion offerings by entering the comfortwear market in 2025 with a new line of eco-friendly slippers and hoodie sweatsuits. data.title: LaFleur Minerals Raises $2.83M for Exploration
data.description:
First Responder Technologies (TSE:LFLR) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

LaFleur Minerals has successfully closed a non-brokered private placement, raising $2.83 million to fund exploration programs on its mineral properties, including the Swanson Gold Project in Québec. This financial move involves issuing flow-through units, which include common shares and warrants, allowing investors to purchase additional shares at a set price. The proceeds are earmarked for Canadian exploration expenses, offering potential tax benefits to eligible investors.

data.description:

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

DeepRock Minerals Inc. has filed additional financial documents related to its spin-off and reverse takeover with Allied Critical Metals Corp. The company aims to transfer its existing assets to a proposed spin-off entity and is seeking shareholder approval for the arrangement at a meeting on December 30, 2024.
